channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Chief of staff to former NYC Mayor Eric Adams, 3 others charged in federal bribery probe
item.description: A chief of staff to former New York City Mayor Eric Adams and several other people have been charged in a federal indictment in connection with alleged bribery scheme involving a city contract.

item.title: Camp Mystic files for bankruptcy after catastrophic Texas floods killed 28 people at the girls’ camp
A member of the cultlike Zizians group is charged in the killings of her parents in Pennsylvania
